summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Entreprise and Partenaire registration flows. All 26 backend API tests passed. Frontend UI tests verified all modals, forms, SIRET verification, email warning, charte ethique, and E2E registration flow.

issues: Console warning: Missing `Description` or `aria-describedby={undefined}` for {DialogContent} - minor accessibility issue

critical_code_review_comments: Minor: DialogContent components missing aria-describedby attribute for accessibility
test_credentials: Test accounts created dynamically with unique emails during testing
seed_data_creation: No seed data needed - tests create their own test accounts
context_for_next_testing_agent: Entreprise and Partenaire registration flows fully tested. Backend endpoints: /api/auth/register-entreprise, /api/auth/register-partenaire, /api/auth/login-pro, /api/siret/verify. Frontend: ProRegisterModal with entreprise/partenaire forms, SIRET verification, email warning for non-professional emails, Charte Ethique ALT&ACT section with 10 principles. All data-testid attributes properly implemented.

backend_apis: GET /api/siret/verify - SIRET verification via API Recherche d'Entreprises (tested with Google France SIRET 44306184100047)
POST /api/auth/register-entreprise - Company registration with all fields + charte_ethique_signed + profile_completion
POST /api/auth/register-partenaire - Partner registration with structure_type + charte_ethique_signed + profile_completion
POST /api/auth/login-pro - Login for entreprise/partenaire by email
POST /api/auth/register - Backward compatibility for pseudo accounts
POST /api/auth/login - Backward compatibility for pseudo accounts
frontend_flows: Landing page: 3 role cards with specific CTA buttons (no 'Accès rapide' anymore)
Landing page: Espace Personnel -> opens AuthModal (pseudo registration)
Landing page: Espace Employeurs -> opens ProRegisterModal with entreprise form
Landing page: Espace Partenaires -> opens ProRegisterModal with partenaire form
Entreprise form: company name, SIRET+verify btn, email, password, first/last name, function dropdown, charte ethique section, CGU+privacy checkboxes
Partenaire form: structure name, structure type dropdown, SIRET+verify btn, email, password, first/last name, function dropdown, charte ethique, CGU+privacy
SIRET verification shows company name and address from API
Email warning for non-professional emails (gmail, yahoo etc.)
Charte Ethique ALT&ACT section with 10 principles expandable
Pro login form with email + password fields
E2E entreprise registration -> redirects to dashboard with success toast

siret_verification: Valid SIRET (14 digits) - verified with Google France 44306184100047
Invalid format (less than 9 digits) - returns error
partenaire_registration_validation: Structure type must be valid enum - validated
All 5 structure types work: organisme_formation, association, institution_publique, acteur_insertion, autre
Same validations as entreprise for other fields
email_warning: Gmail, Yahoo, Hotmail, Outlook, Orange, Free, SFR, Laposte, Wanadoo, AOL trigger warning
Warning is informational only, not blocking
profile_completion: Returned on registration for both entreprise and partenaire
